name: Grilled Chicken Salad with Cilantro Pesto May
recipeIngredient: 1/4 lb Poblano peppers - roasted and diced
1/3 lb Red bell peppers - roasted, peeled, and diced
1/3 cup Green bell peppers - roasted, peeled, and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Grill the chicken over wood, preferably. Chill and dice.
2. Mix the remaining ingredients in a bowl and season to taste with salt and pepper.
3. See the recipe "Cilantro Pesto" in this cookbook for ingredients and directions for preparing the Cilantro Pesto.
